title: GLua Pack
description: We've added GLua Pack to our server. This should speed up those nasty Lua loading times!

changes.text: GLua Pack is an addon that packs all known client-sided Lua files into a bundle so they can be downloaded all at once instead of individually.

title: New Robbery Location
description: The Leslie Green PD is now robbable!

changes.text: You can now raid the Leslie Green PD, featuring 6 large safes, 2 large weapon caches, and a deposit box. Be careful though—Leslie Green's security network notifies the entire police force.

title: Vehicle Damage Fix
description: Resolved a major issue regarding damage transfer while driving.

changes.text: Fixed a bug where the player in the driver's seat would take a massive amount of damage when their vehicle was shot, regardless of where the bullet actually impacted the car.

title: New Car Dealer
description: We've introduced a brand new Car Dealer NPC and removed persistent vehicle damage upon respawn.

changes.text: A new Car Dealer NPC has been added. It is much easier to use and significantly less laggy than the default VCMod car dealer.
Removed the annoying feature where vehicles would remain damaged when respawned. Cars will now spawn fully repaired.

title: PD Equipment Update
description: We've added three new tools to help the police force while on patrol.

changes.text: Police Tablet: Equipped with the PD handbook, wanted suspects list, and criminal/plate lookups. Higher-ups (TSupt+) can also suspend driver's licenses for valid lawful reasons.
Pepper Spray: Temporarily impairs the vision of suspects and slows their movement.
Wheel Clamp: Officers can now clamp vehicle wheels when they have a lawful reason to do so.

title: Bug Fixes & Alterations
description: Various bug fixes & alterations across the server.

changes.text: Added a short one second timer to the cuffs.
Added the PD Armory to the other department buildings.
Changed the speed of various cars.
Allowed Leslie PD stolen items to be pickup-able via grav gun.
Added the ability to change sweps while dragging people with cuffs.
Added a Basic and PD car dealer at Leslie Green.
Added other department jobs to PD Armory.
Added all Police departments to PD Door groups.
